name: roxabi-forge
description: Forge — HTML visual artifacts for Claude Code (diagrams, galleries, guides, epics). Brand-aware, manifest-indexed, Cloudflare Pages ready.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Forge HTML visuals for ~/.roxabi/forge/ — forge-guide (split-file multi-tab doc), forge-epic (issue-linked analysis), forge-chart (single-file Mermaid), forge-gallery (image/audio with shared gallery-base.css/js). Brand-aware, manifest-indexed, Cloudflare Pages ready.
